name: TEAM INC
business: Team Inc. is a global provider of specialty industrial services, including inspection, heat-treating, and mechanical services, serving customers' critical assets across conventional to highly specialized inspection, condition assessment, maintenance, and repair.
sellsTo: Energy (refining, power, renewables, nuclear, offshore oil and gas, liquefied natural gas)
Manufacturing and Process (chemical, petrochemical, pulp and paper, automotive, mining)
Infrastructure (construction and building, roads, dams, amusement parks, bridges, ports, railways)

exposures.sentence: We market our services to companies in a diverse array of heavy industries which include: Energy (refining, power, renewables, nuclear, offshore oil and gas, and liquefied natural gas); Manufacturing and Process (chemical, petrochemical, pulp and paper industries, automotive and mining); Midstream (valves, terminals and storage, and pipeline); Infrastructure (construction and building, roads, dams, amusement parks, bridges, ports, and railways); and Aerospace and Defense.
